---
title: "Involvement"
---

## Join the ASA Interest Group

[Click here to join our ASA Interest Group](https://amstat.jotform.com/250755987384070)


## Join Our Workspace on Slack

Click [here](https://join.slack.com/t/digitalhealth-ds/shared_invite/zt-33vf7fs0k-cFmYUSxqwKHnoh9bi326MA) to join our workspace on [Slack](https://slack.com/signin) or join with the URL [digitalhealth-ds.slack.com](digitalhealth-ds.slack.com)
